prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约9201→8216→5859→29015→12593。2021–2023年（旧高考）位次逐年前移，2024年新高考首年因考试模式与计分方式变化，位次体系重构至29015；2025年迅速回归至12593，较2024年大幅前移约16422名，显示考生对该校的报考意愿在新高考模式下快速回升。2025年基准位次约12593名；该校在广西物理类（含理科）招生计划2021–2024年均为99人，2025年增至102人，2026年计划105人，较2025年小幅扩招约2.9%。扩招使竞争略有加剧，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第84名（2025年第83名），排名稳定，属全国中上游水平。学校以电力为特色，在能源电力行业具有显著影响力；该校在近年声誉监测中未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度未进入全国前100名，短视频平台关注度一般，未出现报考过热或过冷信号。未见投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估：电气工程A（全国前列）、动力工程及工程热物理A-。电气工程及其自动化、能源动力类等核心专业与优势学科高度匹配，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化在2024年专业热度评估中为「高热推荐」，能源动力类为「推荐」，相关专业报考热度持续升温。广西2026年高考总人数约39.2万，较2025年（约38.0万）增加约3.3%；物理类考生估算约26.9万，较2025年（26.0万）增加约3.3%，考生规模扩大使竞争整体加剧。省控线方面，物理类本科批2024年371分、2025年370分，基本平稳；该校位于北京，属一线城市高校，对广西考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12593、2026年小幅扩招约2.9%、广西物理类考生增加约3.3%、电气类专业高热推荐等因素，扩招与考生增加效应基本对冲，但电气类专业高热对报考有正向拉动。预计2026年最低位次约12865名，较2025年略后移约272名，区间12365–13365名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9201 → 8216 → 5859 → 29015 → 12593. From 2021 to 2023 (old college entrance exam), rankings moved forward year by year. In 2024, the first year of the new college entrance exam, due to changes in exam format and scoring methods, the ranking system was restructured to 29015; in 2025, it quickly returned to 12593, moving forward by about 16,422 places compared to 2024, indicating a rapid recovery in candidates' willingness to apply to this university under the new exam model. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 12593. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category (including Science) in Guangxi was 99 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 102 in 2025, and planned to be 105 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 2.9% compared to 2025. The expansion slightly intensifies competition, but the extent is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (83rd in 2025), with a stable ranking in the upper-middle tier nationally. The university is characterized by electric power and has significant influence in the energy and electric power industry. In recent reputation monitoring, no obvious negative public opinion incidents have occurred. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, with general attention on short video platforms, showing no signs of excessive or insufficient application enthusiasm. No records of cutoff score drops have been seen. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Electrical Engineering rated A (top nationally), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics rated A-. Core majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Energy and Power Engineering are highly matched with advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was rated as 'highly recommended' in the 2024 major popularity assessment, and Energy and Power Engineering was 'recommended', with related majors' application enthusiasm continuing to heat up. The total number of Guangxi college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (about 380,000). Physics Category candidates are estimated to be about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (260,000), with the expansion of candidate numbers intensifying overall competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Physics Category undergraduate batch was 371 points in 2024 and 370 points in 2025, basically stable. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional attraction for Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12593, a slight expansion of about 2.9% in 2026, an increase of about 3.3% in Guangxi Physics Category candidates, and the high popularity of electrical majors, the effects of expansion and candidate increase basically offset each other, but the high popularity of electrical majors positively drives applications. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be about 12,865, slightly moving back by about 272 places compared to 2025, with a range of 12,365 to 13,365.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 12,865, with a range of 12,365 to 13,365. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Communication Engineering, Software Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.), while Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer Science) can be targeted as stretch goals. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<12,365), focus on Tier 1. Tier 3 majors (Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, etc.) are suitable for candidates with rankings near the upper limit as safety options. Electrical majors, due to their A rating in discipline evaluation and high industry popularity, are the most competitive and require sufficient buffer.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1656 → 2090 → 1868 → 45125 → 2100. From 2021 to 2023 (old college entrance exam), rankings fluctuated narrowly between 1656 and 2090; in 2024, the first year of the new exam, the ranking system was restructured to 45125 (including special major groups such as Sino-foreign cooperation), with the actual ranking for regular major groups around 2451; in 2025, it returned to 2100, moving forward by about 351 places compared to the 2024 regular group. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2100; the university's enrollment plan for History Category (including Liberal Arts) in Guangxi was 7 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 6 in 2025, and planned at 6 for 2026, consistent with 2025. The plan is stable, with no additional impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. As a science and engineering university with a focus on electric power, its liberal arts enrollment is small and not a strength of the university; no significant negative public opinion has been observed in recent reputation monitoring; its Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, indicating average attention. No record of admission score drops; the university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), with no direct disciplinary mapping to liberal arts majors (Law, Foreign Languages, Journalism and Communication, Public Administration, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts-related majors (Law, Foreign Languages, Journalism and Communication) is divided: Law is 'recommended' but highly competitive, Foreign Languages is 'generally wait-and-see', and Journalism and Communication is 'clearly discouraged'. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Guangxi is approximately 392,000, with an estimated 123,000 History Category examinees, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (119,000), intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Regarding provincial control lines, the History Category undergraduate batch was 400 points in 2024 and 402 points in 2025, basically stable; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2100, the stable 2026 enrollment plan, and the approximately 3.3% increase in Guangxi History Category examinees, the increase in candidates slightly intensifies competition, but due to the small liberal arts enrollment and average attention, the fluctuation range is limited. The minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be approximately 2115, slightly moving back by about 15 places compared to 2025, with a range of 1734–2496.

Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Network and New Media, Translation) as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (Law, English Innovation Class) as a reach; candidates significantly above the lower limit of the range (<1734) can focus on Law. Tier 3 Administrative Management is suitable as a safety option for candidates near the upper limit of the range. The university has few liberal arts majors and only 6 planned spots, so applicants should note the limited choice of majors.
